_meta.schema: publish=true → expand schedule from window/closed/overrides (day = base window unless in closed[](=null) or overrides{}); publish=false → schedule null (raw fallback). days: mon..sun. times HH:MM (24+ = past midnight). status explains why not published.
_meta.policy: 無休/explicit weekly closure → structured. 第N曜/毎月N日/不定休 → monthly/irregular (null). multi-window or seasonal hours → null. annual-only closure (1/1, 元旦, dec maintenance) → deferred-annual (null for now; open-all-week candidate pending policy decision).
